title: Duch-auto-clicker
description: This mod adds a configurable auto-clicker for both the left and right mouse buttons
body:
⚡ Duch Auto Clicker  ⚡

Tired of destroying your mouse while grinding mobs, building farms, or speed-bridging for hours?
Duch Auto Clicker is a lightweight and highly configurable client-side auto clicker mod for Fabric that gives you full control over both left click and right click automation directly inside Minecraft! 🎮🔥

Perfect for:

⚔️ PvP practice
🧟 Mob farms
⛏️ AFK grinding
🌾 Farming
🏗️ Building
🎯 General gameplay comfort
✨ Features
🖱️ Left & Right Click Support

Automatically spam:

Left mouse button (attack/mining)
Right mouse button (placing/using items)
⚡ CPS & CPT Modes

Customize your clicking speed exactly how you want.

🔹 CPS Mode

Clicks Per Second system:

Set your preferred CPS
Smooth and responsive clicking
Great for PvP & combat
🔹 CPT Mode

Clicks Per Tick system:

Minecraft tick-based clicking
More stable timing
Perfect for technical gameplay
🎛️ Fully Configurable GUI

The mod includes a built-in settings screen where you can:

Change CPS values
Edit binds
Toggle modes
Configure left/right click behavior
Adjust timings

Everything is easy to use directly in-game. 💎

🔑 Custom Keybinds

Create your own hotkeys for:

Enabling/disabling autoclicker
Switching modes
Separate left/right click control

No external software needed. 🚀

🧩 Mod Menu Integration

Works with:

Mod Menu

Open settings instantly from your mods list for a clean and modern experience.

🪶 Lightweight & Optimized

✅ Client-side only
✅ Minimal performance impact
✅ Clean codebase
✅ Smooth gameplay experience

No unnecessary bloat — just fast and reliable auto clicking.
